sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69414" key="murtwth/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυρτωτή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of vase <sense id="n69414.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">patterned with myrtle-sprays, AJ</tr_>A<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0062.tlg046:31:349" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31.349</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
